hooks.command: cd "C:/Projetos/restaurante-pedidos" && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then HASH=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 'novo'); MSG="auto: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"; git commit -m "$MSG" && git push origin master && echo "[deploy-log] commit $HASH enviado para master"; fi || true
